name: Cause-Effect — Root Cause Analysis of Failed Replication
input: Create a fishbone (Ishikawa) diagram for root cause analysis of a failed replication study. Effect: Failed Replication. Causes: Methods (different reagent lot, protocol deviation), Equipment (uncalibrated spectrophotometer, old centrifuge), Personnel (different operator, insufficient training), Materials (sample degradation, contaminated media), Measurement (different assay kit, inconsistent threshold), Environment (temperature fluctuation, humidity difference).
qualityCriteria: Items present (Methods, Equipment, Personnel, Materials, Measurement, Environment)
Description for each item is present
No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
Cause and effect branches for each category
napkinBenchmark: Fishbone diagram with central spine pointing to 'Failed Replication'. Six diagonal branches for each cause category, each with 2 sub-causes.

data.title: Root Cause Analysis: Failed Replication Study

items.label: Methods
items.description: Different reagent lot number; protocol deviation in incubation time

items.label: Equipment
items.description: Uncalibrated spectrophotometer; aging centrifuge with vibration

items.label: Personnel
items.description: Different operator performed assay; insufficient training on protocol

items.label: Materials
items.description: Sample degradation during shipping; contaminated growth media batch

items.label: Measurement
items.description: Different assay kit version used; inconsistent threshold settings

items.label: Environment
items.description: Temperature fluctuation in incubator; humidity difference in lab

data.caption: Six categories of potential causes for the failed replication attempt
